task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/safety.ts

Fix false positive joyful classification. Remove "just got" from joyful keywords — it is too generic and matches negative situations like "we just got a term sheet but the investor wants to replace me."

Replace the joyful keywords array. The new joyful keywords should be:
"so excited", "amazing news", "they said yes", "we did it", "celebrating", "i got the job", "we shipped", "got accepted", "best day"

Keep all other logic, exports, and keywords exactly as they are.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/safety.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
"just got" removed from joyful keywords
New joyful keywords list in place
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change any other keywords or logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
